item.title: ".. the small Quebec town ... has become the first municipal…
item.author: Oliver (@oliver48.bsky.social)
item.description:
".. the small Quebec town ... has become the first municipality in Canada to officially recognize trees as living beings with inherent rights ... declaring that trees deserve protection, including the right to life, natural growth, integrity, and regeneration"
www.facebook.com/groups/29053...
item.content:encoded:
".. the small Quebec town ... has become the first municipality in Canada to officially recognize trees as living beings with inherent rights ... declaring that trees deserve protection, including the right to life, natural growth, integrity, and regeneration"
www.facebook.com/groups/29053...

item.title: トマトの皮が、長雨で弾けちゃって、これだけ😢 ガーキン(ミニきゅうり)は、昨日収穫しとけば良かった……欲は出すもんじ…
item.author: にゃんこ耳 (@oueitokiwazu.bsky.social)
item.description:
トマトの皮が、長雨で弾けちゃって、これだけ😢

ガーキン(ミニきゅうり)は、昨日収穫しとけば良かった……欲は出すもんじゃないね。

#家庭菜園

item.title: おはようございます。 今日は七夕か～(・｀ω´･) ということで、ショー☆イマダさんのイラストをお借りしました(≧∇≦…
item.author: 風祭 史紀 (かざまつり しき) (@kazamaturisiki.bsky.social)
item.description:
おはようございます。
今日は七夕か～(・｀ω´･)

ということで、ショー☆イマダさんのイラストをお借りしました(≧∇≦)
（かわいいイラストありがとうございます！）
今の願い事はこれしかないかな……(人－ω－) かないますように……
item.content:encoded:
おはようございます。
今日は七夕か～(・｀ω´･)

ということで、ショー☆イマダさんのイラストをお借りしました(≧∇≦)
（かわいいイラストありがとうございます！）
今の願い事はこれしかないかな……(人－ω－) かないますように……

item.title: Rogers Sports and Media is closing its Sportsnet 650 radio s…
item.author: Mediagazer (@mediagazer.com)
item.description:
Rogers Sports and Media is closing its Sportsnet 650 radio station in Vancouver, Sportsnet 960 station in Calgary, and four other stations, affecting 80 workers (Sammy Hudes/Canadian Press)

Main Link | Mediagazer Permalink
item.content:encoded:
Rogers Sports and Media is closing its Sportsnet 650 radio station in Vancouver, Sportsnet 960 station in Calgary, and four other stations, affecting 80 workers (Sammy Hudes/Canadian Press)

item.title: Taylor Swift’s PR machine has kept photos of her wedding ins…
item.author: The Wall Street Journal (@wsj.com)
item.description: Taylor Swift’s PR machine has kept photos of her wedding inside Madison Square Garden under lock and key. But celebrity guests are sharing winks and nods about the nuptials and reception on social media. 🔗 on.wsj.com/4wvDi5v
item.content:encoded: Taylor Swift’s PR machine has kept photos of her wedding inside Madison Square Garden under lock and key. But celebrity guests are sharing winks and nods about the nuptials and reception on social media. 🔗 on.wsj.com/4wvDi5v

item.title: During a meeting with Turkish President Erdogan, ahead of th…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: During a meeting with Turkish President Erdogan, ahead of the NATO summit, President Trump expressed openness to the U.S. resuming sales of F-35 fighter jets to Turkey. During his first term, Trump excluded Turkey from the fighter jet program when Turkey bought an air defense system from Russia.
item.content:encoded: During a meeting with Turkish President Erdogan, ahead of the NATO summit, President Trump expressed openness to the U.S. resuming sales of F-35 fighter jets to Turkey. During his first term, Trump excluded Turkey from the fighter jet program when Turkey bought an air defense system from Russia.

item.title: The best products aren't always the most expensive ones. The…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: The best products aren't always the most expensive ones. These are the simple, affordable items that have improved our coworkers' lives. nyti.ms/3Rnz159
item.content:encoded: The best products aren't always the most expensive ones. These are the simple, affordable items that have improved our coworkers' lives. nyti.ms/3Rnz159

item.title: JUST IN: French far-right leader Marine Le Pen announced tha…
item.author: Reuters (@reuters.com)
item.description: JUST IN: French far-right leader Marine Le Pen announced that she will run for president in 2027 after an appeals court shortened her ban on holding public office reut.rs/4f41JzQ
item.content:encoded: JUST IN: French far-right leader Marine Le Pen announced that she will run for president in 2027 after an appeals court shortened her ban on holding public office reut.rs/4f41JzQ

item.title: Good morning world! This mornings stop on my run, time to he…
item.author: Mr C (@mysteriousmrc81.bsky.social)
item.description:
Good morning world! This mornings stop on my run, time to head back for breakfast… and nothing else for the day 😁 have a good one!

#laketahoe #tahoe #summer #oursky #nature #wildlife #lakelife #happy
item.content:encoded:
Good morning world! This mornings stop on my run, time to head back for breakfast… and nothing else for the day 😁 have a good one!

#laketahoe #tahoe #summer #oursky #nature #wildlife #lakelife #happy

item.title: Good morning. Those who grow with us through the adverse, ro…
item.author: Climb To The Clouds (@climbtotheclouds.bsky.social)
item.description:
Good morning.
Those who grow with us through the adverse, root us. Strongly in support, so we can find our light.
Have a beautiful day.
#thicktrunktuesday #rockintuesday #photography #forest #ECK #EastCoastKin
item.content:encoded:
Good morning.
Those who grow with us through the adverse, root us. Strongly in support, so we can find our light.
Have a beautiful day.
#thicktrunktuesday #rockintuesday #photography #forest #ECK #EastCoastKin

item.title: NEW: Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton appears to have used …
item.author: ProPublica (@propublica.org)
item.description:
NEW: Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton appears to have used an address where he did not live while voting in six elections in the past two years — despite warning voters that “it is illegal to misrepresent your residence on election records.”

with @texastribune.org
item.content:encoded:
NEW: Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton appears to have used an address where he did not live while voting in six elections in the past two years — despite warning voters that “it is illegal to misrepresent your residence on election records.”

with @texastribune.org

item.title: Eben die Endfassung abgegeben, mein literarisches Debüt. Hat…
item.author: Lorenz Meyer (@thereallorenzmeyer.bsky.social)
item.description: Eben die Endfassung abgegeben, mein literarisches Debüt. Hat mich viele Jahre gekostet, dahin zu kommen. Erscheint in vier Monaten. Drückt mir die Daumen.
item.content:encoded: Eben die Endfassung abgegeben, mein literarisches Debüt. Hat mich viele Jahre gekostet, dahin zu kommen. Erscheint in vier Monaten. Drückt mir die Daumen.

item.title: An Afghan national who fought alongside U.S. forces has died…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: An Afghan national who fought alongside U.S. forces has died from an allergic reaction while in ICE custody, one day after he was detained for deportation proceedings, his death certificate shows. www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news...
item.content:encoded: An Afghan national who fought alongside U.S. forces has died from an allergic reaction while in ICE custody, one day after he was detained for deportation proceedings, his death certificate shows. www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news...

item.title: A Argentina tem o jogador mais importante da história da Cop…
item.author: Rafael C (@calsaverini.me)
item.description:
A Argentina tem o jogador mais importante da história da Copa do Mundo, que é a FIFA.

Ah, tem o Messi também.
item.content:encoded:
A Argentina tem o jogador mais importante da história da Copa do Mundo, que é a FIFA.

item.title: To everyone who signed my middle school yearbook: you'll be …
